'''âf-n-ng-k''' ('''kafangekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackboot|jackboot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackboot|jackboot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-n-ng-k
|-
! Lemma
| kafangekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifangekoko|thifangekoko]] || [[word:jifangekoko|jifangekoko]] || [[word:shifangekoko|shifangekoko]] || [[word:kifangekoko|kifangekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufangekoko|thuthufangekoko]] || [[word:jujufangekoko|jujufangekoko]] || [[word:shushufangekoko|shushufangekoko]] || [[word:kukufangekoko|kukufangekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufangekoko|thufangekoko]] || [[word:jufangekoko|jufangekoko]] || [[word:shufangekoko|shufangekoko]] || [[word:kufangekoko|kufangekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufangekoko|thufangekoko]] || [[word:jufangekoko|jufangekoko]] || [[word:shufangekoko|shufangekoko]] || [[word:kufangekoko|kufangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefangekoko|thefangekoko]] || [[word:jefangekoko|jefangekoko]] || [[word:shefangekoko|shefangekoko]] || [[word:kefangekoko|kefangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofangekoko|thothofangekoko]] || [[word:jojofangekoko|jojofangekoko]] || [[word:shoshofangekoko|shoshofangekoko]] || [[word:kokofangekoko|kokofangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofangekoko|thofangekoko]] || [[word:jofangekoko|jofangekoko]] || [[word:shofangekoko|shofangekoko]] || [[word:kofangekoko|kofangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofangekoko|thofangekoko]] || [[word:jofangekoko|jofangekoko]] || [[word:shofangekoko|shofangekoko]] || [[word:kofangekoko|kofangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfangekoko|thĂŠfangekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfangekoko|jĂŠfangekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfangekoko|shĂŠfangekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfangekoko|kĂŠfangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafangekoko|thathafangekoko]] || [[word:jajafangekoko|jajafangekoko]] || [[word:shashafangekoko|shashafangekoko]] || [[word:kakafangekoko|kakafangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafangekoko|thafangekoko]] || [[word:jafangekoko|jafangekoko]] || [[word:shafangekoko|shafangekoko]] || [[word:kafangekoko|kafangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafangekoko|thafangekoko]] || [[word:jafangekoko|jafangekoko]] || [[word:shafangekoko|shafangekoko]] || [[word:kafangekoko|kafangekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
